title: ‘Godot’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Juan Linietsky
fact: Godot is an open source game engine released under the MIT License.

title: ‘Unreal Engine 5’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Epic Games
fact: Unreal Engine 5 (UE5) is the latest iteration of Unreal Engine, developed by Epic Games.

title: ‘Unreal Engine 4’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Epic Games
fact: Unreal Engine 4 (UE4) is the fourth version of Unreal Engine developed by Epic Games.

title: ‘Decima’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Guerrilla Games
fact: Decima is a proprietary game engine made by Guerrilla Games and released in November 2013, that includes tools and features like artificial intelligence and game physics.

title: ‘CryEngine’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Crytek
fact: CryEngine is a game engine designed by the German game developer Crytek.

title: ‘Unreal Engine 3’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Epic Games
fact: Unreal Engine 3 (UE3) is the third version of Unreal Engine developed by Epic Games.

title: ‘PICO-8’ is released
subtitle: Game engine
fact: PICO-8 is a virtual machine and game engine created by Lexaloffle Games.

title: ‘Luanti’ is released
subtitle: Game engine by Perttu Ahola
fact: Luanti is a community-driven, free and open-source voxel game engine, available on various platforms.
